name: Sims Limited
description: Founded in 1917, Sims Limited is a global leader in metal recycling and circular solutions for technology. Headquartered in Australia, the company operates over 155 facilities across 13 countries, playing a vital role in the circular economy by recovering and recycling materials to minimize waste. Through its primary divisions, Sims Metal and Sims Lifecycle Services, the company provides essential services in metal processing and IT asset disposition. Driven by the purpose to create a world without waste to preserve the planet, Sims Limited is committed to sustainability, innovation, and decarbonization across its global operations.
